Core Mathematics
C12
Algebra and functions; coordinate geometry in the (x, y) plane; sequences and series; exponentials and logarithms; trigonometry; differentiation; integration.
C34
Algebra and functions; sequences and series; trigonometry; exponentials and logarithms; coordinate geometry in the (x, y) plane; differentiation; integration; numerical methods; vectors.

Further Pure Mathematics
F1
Complex numbers; roots of quadratic equations; numerical solution of equations; coordinate systems; matrix algebra; transformations using matrices; series; proof.
F2
Inequalities; series; further complex numbers; first order differential equations; second order differential equations; Maclaurin and Taylor series; Polar coordinates.
F3
Hyperbolic functions; further coordinate systems; differentiation; integration; vectors; further matrix algebra.

Statistics
S1
Mathematical models in probability and statistics; representation and summary of data; probability; correlation and regression; discrete random variables; discrete distributions; the Normal distribution.
S2
The Binomial and Poisson distributions; continuous random variables; continuous distributions; samples; hypothesis tests.
S3
Combinations of random variables; sampling; estimation, confidence intervals and tests; goodness of fit and contingency tables; regression and correlation.

Decision Mathematics
D1
Algorithms; algorithms on graphs; the route inspection problem; critical path analysis; linear programming; matchings.

首先我而家相當肯定上面位巴打嘅意思係想講al pure maths嘅內容（唔係個邏輯訓練）同stat係相輔相成，而呢個的確係真

我諗我同會考巴對中學數學教育應該行咩方向嘅睇法真係好唔同
我個人就真係偏向盡量教應用範圍廣、唔同學科都會應用到嘅知識
會考巴講嘅睇穿人哋嘅邏輯謬誤，個人覺得可以直接train
好似英文proofreading咁俾學生睇段落，搵出漏洞咁
以前我阿媽定唔知阿爸就係買咗本咁嘅書畀我操

唔係好同意stat初學就一定比唔到intuition
其實我覺得都要睇topic，好似bias and variance of estimators，method of moments，type i type ii error呢啲都好容易get
當然冇可能教咗啲computation就算
我主張中學教stat係類似教econ咁不過再多啲applied data analysis成份
重視清晰concept，多啲real life example，多啲interpretation
唔係淨係講stat inference theory，仲講下啲statistical fallacy呀，data visualisation呀，practical issues例如nonresponse error呀嗰啲
甚至可以加下R programming元素

當然基礎stat都有好多好難get到intuitive meaning嘅嘢，例如clt，neyman pearson，cramer rao，complete statistic呢啲
但係同時，呢堆嘢基本上只係得clt搬到過中學教
而get唔到clt 嘅intuitive原理完全唔影響你對data analysis嘅理解
當clt係魔術咁用就算，喺practical角度嚟講我覺得冇問題
始終學生大部分都唔會讀stat (or maths) pg

去到research先學stat我覺得真係太遲
一來stat嘅硬知識要時間build up，二來本身stat有自己mindset，都係要慢慢建立
我嗰科就係太遲嘅例子，始終文科，多數u ug冇stat requirement（city比較computational，佢哋可能例外）
然後啲人去到master就要喺一個sem內由t test都唔識做變咗識fit linear mixed effect model
當然無可奈何，理解上要偷工減料
有時labmate問我stat，連個問題點formulate都唔係好清楚，我要講下啲basic concept咁

anyway講得遠咗少少，stat本身就算唔係做research嘅人都應該識
學樓上有個巴打話齋，開stat就會少啲覺得n/N細就等於nonrepresentative、唔知道n嘅size先會影響個margin of error嘅人
所以我覺得作為中學主科，取代通識係理想不過
我從來唔覺得stat應該喺中學以數學咁嘅形式教
